title: Epic Fight & Other Mods Weapons Compabilities
description: Epic Fight & Other Mods Weapons Compat. Customization of Weapons of another mods to match Epic Fight and addons moveset and animations
body:
~~(my first mod/datapack, "things may break!")~~
![Epic Fight Mod & Other Mods Weapons Compabilities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95417d87426f7fe08fa056a4f3450f64fd75e43f.png)

**Epic Samurai, Epic Knights, Dungeon Weapons, Born in chaos, Simply Swords and severe other mod weapons compability with Epic Fight, Weapons of Miracles, Epic Fight Battle Styles and other addons.**

**New Trails textures for EFM Compat!**

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea8912ccea0eb56cb260d9ea81dbc1bfaf829b64.png)
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/081647b1537d2748e184fe2bcaea9306b882d5cc.png)
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f0ba18631b96c57afc65e62e1fa152beb1970f7.png)
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/420abf1b6d3e87197ee4289e4e84f0140ca14af3.png)

**This datapack/mod was made for the lastest version of epic fight (20.6.3) for the 1.20.1 to be compatible with various mods. Changing the moveset of weapons based of my personal taste, feel free to modify at your own taste.**

_How to make a datapack for custom Weapons and Armors for Epic Fight:_
https://epicfight-docs.readthedocs.io/Guides/page2/#onetwo-handed-weapon-file

**Recomended to use:**
**[Epic Fight x Iron's Spells Armor Fix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/epic-fight-x-irons-spells-armor-fix) by cacheing**

## Weapons from

**-[born in chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos) by mongoose_artist**

**-[Epic Samurai](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-samurais) by VeroxUniverse**

**-[Epic Knights](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons)/magistuarmory by magistu_**

**-[Dungeon Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-weapons) by thespringaling**

**-[Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) by sweenuss**

**-[Ice and Fire: Dragons](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons) by sbom_xela**

**-[MC Dungeon Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcdw) by chronos_sacaria**

**-[Epic Knights Addon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-addon) by magistu_**

**-[Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae) by Obscuria**

**-[Fabled Weaponry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabled-weaponry) by DaddyUnion**

**-[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) by verctorwing**

**-[Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) by Iron431**

**-[L_Ender 's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm(cataclysm)) by mcl_ender**

**-[Reliquary Reincarnations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reliquary-reincarnations) by P3pp3rF1y**

**-[Vampirism - Become a vampire!](https://modrinth.com/mod/vampirism) by maxanier and Cheaterpaul**

**-[Dave's Potioneering](https://modrinth.com/mod/daves-potioneering) by SoterDave**

**-[The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)[The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) by TheAetherTeam**

**-[Basic Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/basic-weapons) by Khazoda**

**-[Biomancy](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomancy) by Elenterius**

**-[Blue Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies) by ModdingLegacy**

**-[Elementus](https://modrinth.com/mod/elementus) & [Elementus: Arcane](https://modrinth.com/mod/elementus-arcane) by Nokunami**

**-[Epic Paladins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-paladins) & [Epic Empires](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-empires) by VeroxUniverse**

**-[Forbidden and Arcanus](https://modrinth.com/mod/forbidden-arcanus) by cesar_zorak**

**-[Knave's Needs](https://modrinth.com/mod/knaves-needs) by KodoDenka**

**-[L2 Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2weaponry) by Icy0x1**

**-[RPG Style More Weapons!](https://modrinth.com/mod/rpg_style_more_weapons) by zrikon**

**-[Simple Weapons for Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-weapons-for-better-combat) (Now for Epic Fight!) by InfernalEclipse**

**-[The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) by Benimatic**

**-[The Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden) by Quek04**

**-[Plus The End](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/plus-the-end) by praizazdd7724 (only for 1.8)**

**And even more in the future!...**


## Other compabilities

**-[Villager Recruits](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-recruits) by talhanation**

**-[artorias: epic fight addon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/artorias-epicfight-addon) by sunwoolove777**

**-[EEEAB's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eeeabs-mobs) by EEEAB**

**-[Relics Of Gaming Continued](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-of-gaming-continued) (Only Trails were changed) by power282**


## Expected to work with (and obligatory dependencies for full experience)

**-[Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) by maninthe_home/yesman**

**-[Weapons of Miracles](https://modrinth.com/mod/weapons-of-miracles) by reascer**

**-[Epic Fight Battle Styles](https://modrinth.com/mod/ef-bs) by Forixaim**

**-[Epic Fight - Guandao Moveset](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-guandao-moveset) by namelesslk**


**Datapack made by ElC4 with the contribution of Йохан Петрович**

### Based of others datapack like
 
**-[simplyswords with epicfight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-swords-with-epicfight) by sunwoolove777**

**-epic-kinghts-EFM from (epic knights discord server)**


## Q&A

**Can you add this mod [insert any weapons mod]?**

_I am aware about the mods that are suggested in the comments section of Curseforge, once I take time to work in the mod im going to test the mods to see how compatible are they with Epic Fight, some mods like Weapons Masters that have his own battle mechanic so trying to force it to work with Epic Fight will do a mess. Thats why they should be tested first._


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This being my first datapack/mod kinda means that I just jump in a giant pool without knowing how to properly swim, I don't know to much about Java and I still don't understand how it works with minecraft mods but im learning. Also I am a student so probably im geting bussy with some stuff and most of my free time im playing something else, hope you understand.

Also sorry if I misspell something english is not my first language.

</details>

Any doubt or you want to report any issue or bug you can find me in the Epic Fight Discord
